resource.name: Aditya Birla Health Insurance Co. Limited

type.text: OPD Expenses: Indemnity for Reasonable and Customary Charges incurred towards Medically Necessary Treatment taken by the Insured Person during the Policy Period for an Illness, Injury.
Pharmacy Expenses: Indemnity for Reasonable and Customary Charges incurred towards medically required pharmacy expenses on an out-patient basis.
100% of the Sum Insured shall be payable on the diagnosis of Major Stage Cancer.
100% of the Sum Insured shall be payable on the diagnosis of Advanced Stage Cancer.
50% of the Sum Insured or ₹10 Lacs, whichever is lower, shall be payable on the diagnosis of Early Stage Cancer (Carcinoma-in-situ).
Maximum liability under this Option during the lifetime of the Insured Person: 150% of the Sum Insured.
Monthly limit for hospitalization due to Injury/Illness as specified in the Policy Schedule.
Daily limit for palliative care for Advanced Stage Cancer as specified in the Policy Schedule.
Limit for genetic testing for detected Illness as specified in the Policy Schedule.
Limit for reconstructive surgery for Major Stage Cancer or Advanced Stage Cancer as specified in the Policy Schedule.
genetic testing of the Insured Person for the same detected Illness
monthly limit for hospitalization due to Injury/Illness
monthly payment for every 30 days of continuous disability
medical expenses incurred at Network Providers / Empaneled Service Providers
coverage for Medical Expenses incurred during hospitalization for covered Illness
Day Care Treatment for covered Illness
Conventional treatments for Cancer including organ transplantation
Advanced treatments for Cancer

Associated Medical Expenses including Room Rent, nursing charges, operation theatre charges, fees of Medical Practitioner including surgeon/anaesthetist/specialist within the same Hospital where the Insured Person has been admitted.
Cashless facility for treatment costs.
Domiciliary Hospitalization for medical treatment at home under specific circumstances.
Day Care Treatment for medical treatment or surgical procedures undertaken in less than 24 hours.
Home confinement treatment under specific conditions
In-patient care for a minimum of 24 consecutive hours
ICU charges including bed, medical support services, and critical care nursing
Post-hospitalization medical expenses for a predefined number of days
